title: handle_state_change silently drops events when chat_account_id absent
description: In client_task.rs line 700, session.chat_account_id().unwrap_or_default() substitutes the empty string when the session has no chat account. changed.get("") always returns None, silently dropping the state-change event. The session was already checked at startup (line 123 uses the same .unwrap_or_default() pattern). Either (a) guard once at session load and store account_id as a String in the task scope so it is always present by the time handle_state_change runs, or (b) use ok_or and propagate/log the error rather than defaulting to empty. The current code masks a configuration error that should be observable.
